description: I'm building a simple todo app with user accounts and a REST API
I'm building a real-time chat application with user presence indicators, typing indicators, and message history
I'm building a blog platform with SEO optimization, server-side rendering, and a content management system
I'm building a machine learning dashboard to visualize model performance metrics and run data pipelines
I'm building a marketing website with a blog, landing pages, and contact forms that need great SEO
I'm building an e-commerce store with product listings, a shopping cart, and Stripe payments
I'm building a social media app with user profiles, posts, likes, follows, and image uploads
I'm building a Next.js app with authentication and need a database, keeping everything in one ecosystem
I'm building a REST API for a mobile app that handles user data, push notifications, and file uploads
I'm building a content-heavy news site with an admin panel, editorial workflow, and thousands of articles
I'm building a data analytics platform with Python data processing, charts, and a REST API
I'm building a project management tool with real-time collaboration, task boards, and team workspaces
I'm building a SaaS app with subscription billing using Stripe, user dashboards, and team accounts
I'm building a lightweight Vue app to display a portfolio and contact form with no backend needed
I'm building a document storage app where users can upload, organise and share files with flexible metadata
